abilities.description: The being whose sole purpose is to create and grand abilities maintaining balance of the existence itself.
abilities.name: Creator

abilities.description: Temporarily phase into Spectator Mode to pass through walls and scout.
details: Activation: Look Down and press Swap Item (F).
Effect: Enters Spectator Mode for a short duration to pass through walls.
Exit: Left-Click to cancel the form early.
abilities.name: Spector

abilities.description: Enchant items directly without RNG using a custom ritual system.
details: Start: Left-Click an Enchanting Table with the item you want to enchant.
Navigate: Tap Sneak to cycle through enchantments, Right-Click to select.
Channeling: Stand completely still after confirming to complete the ritual.
abilities.name: Enchanter

abilities.description: Change your size and stats to adapt to any situation.
details: Transform: Hold Sneak and press Swap Item (F).
Control: Look Up while transforming to Grow, Look Down to Shrink.
Colossal: While Large, Look Up and press F again to charge the ultimate form.
abilities.name: Shifter

abilities.description: Grant flight to yourself or allies, and levitate enemies.
details: Self Flight: Hold Sneak, Look Down, and Right-Click.
Ally Flight: Hold Sneak and Right-Click another player to grant them flight.
Levitate: Hold Sneak and Right-Click a mob to lift them into the air.
abilities.name: Flotter

abilities.description: Cast powerful blessings and curses using a ritual menu system.
details: Menu: Look Down + Sneak + F to open the Grimoire.
Navigate: Sneak to cycle options, Swap Item (F) to confirm.
Ritual: Select a target and tier to cast. Movement cancels the process.
abilities.name: Wizard

abilities.description: A brawler class focused on physics manipulation and combo attacks.
details: Bankai: Jump 3 times while Sneaking to charge, then hit an enemy to unleash.
Grab: Hold Sneak and Right-Click an entity to pick them up.
Throw: Left-Click while holding an entity to launch them.
Slam: Look Down and Left-Click while holding an entity to slam them into the ground.
Clutch: Hold Sneak and Left-Click in mid-air to catch yourself.
abilities.name: Strengther

abilities.description: A tank class with death prevention and self-resurrection capabilities.
details: Ritual: Hold Sneak, Look Down, and Right-Click to channel.
Effect: Fully heals you and knocks back surrounding enemies after channeling.
abilities.name: Immortal

abilities.description: Harvest souls to fuel rapid dashes and lifesteal attacks.
details: Harvest: Kill mobs or players to charge the Reaper's Scythe with souls.
Dash: Hold Sneak and Right-Click with the Scythe to consume a soul and dash forward.
abilities.name: Reaper

abilities.description: Master of space and rifts, capable of instant blinks and player transportation.
details: Blink: Hold Sneak (Shift) and press F to instantly teleport where you are looking.
Network: Look Down + Sneak + F to open the Warp Menu and Signal System.
Rifts: Manage up to 10 personal warp points or request to teleport to other players.
abilities.name: Teleporter

abilities.description: Locate specific structures and biomes anywhere in the world.
details: Activate: Right-Click with the Grand Compass to open the menu.
Navigate: Tap Sneak to cycle through options, press Swap Item (F) to confirm.
Warp: Once found, click the chat message or Look Down + F to initiate a safe warp.
abilities.name: Locator

abilities.description: An excavation class that can move through the earth and process ores automatically.
details: Equip: Use /mole to summon the specialized Mole Pickaxe.
Burrow: Hold the Pickaxe, hold Sneak, and Right-Click the ground to tunnel.
Stop: Release Sneak to stop burrowing and resurface.
abilities.name: Mole

0.content:
Type: Mining

The Mole ability has been added to the server! Master underground mining with instant digging capabilities and ground dashing powers.
0.title: New Ability: Mole Added!

1.content:
Active: /freeze - Encase nearby players in ice for 5 seconds.

Passive: No freezing damage, can breathe and swim faster in water.
1.title: New Sub-Ability Concept: Ice

-OgMxHOuqrstUqF6gFcf.content:
The official resource pack for the server is in development. So, the members of the servers are allowed to submit their models for the custom weapons. Postulates

- The current audition only has the reaper scythe as a candidate.

-The model cannot be higher than 32*32 resolution.

-Both 2D and 3D models are accepted ,additional animation and placement file should also be attached together.

It must be noted that your model may not be 'fully' implemented.Submit in messenger chat of SMP or send email at visionadhikari8@gmail.com​
-OgMxHOuqrstUqF6gFcf.title: Custom Model Audition

-OkCombatUpdate.content:
Combat System Redesigned!

The server's combat system has received a major visual and mechanical overhaul. You can now track your combat status more effectively.

  • New Scoreboard: A high-fidelity sidebar now displays your opponent's name and remaining combat time.
  • Extended Timer: Combat now lasts for 30 seconds.
  • Combat Log Detection: Leaving the server while in combat will now be announced server-wide.
  • XP Bar Freed: The combat timer has been moved entirely to the scoreboard, returning your XP bar to its original purpose.


Locator Ritual Polish:

  • Improved UI: The Grand Compass menu now features viewport scrolling for long lists and a dedicated Back (Q key) function.
-OkCombatUpdate.title: Major Update: Combat Overhaul & Ritual Polish

-OkLocatorFix.content:
The Locator ability has been fully restored!

I have optimized the scanning systems to ensure all structures and biomes can be found accurately across all dimensions. The interface has been revamped for a much smoother and more intuitive experience.

Updated Controls:

      Navigation: Use Sneak to cycle through the menu options.

      Selection: Press F (Swap Item) to confirm your selection.

      Warping: Once a location is found, simply click the message in chat or look fully down and press F to warp safely.

Teleportation is now safer with automatic height adjustment and slow falling. Happy exploring!
-OkLocatorFix.title: Ability Update: Locator Fixed!

-OkReaperUpdate.content:
Reaper Update:

A new passive ability has been added to the Reaper class. You are now permanently immune to all projectile damage while holding the Scythe.
-OkReaperUpdate.title: Ability Update: Reaper Passive Added

-OkWizardRework.content:
Wizard Rework:

The Wizard class has moved from chat commands to a menu-based ritual system.

  • Activation: Look Down + Sneak + F to open the Grimoire.
  • Spells: Choose between Blessings (Buffs) and Curses (Debuffs).
  • Targeting: Select a player from the menu.
  • Scaling: Select Tier I, II, or III for increased duration and cost.
-OkWizardRework.title: Ability Rework: Wizard

-OkScoreboardRework.content:
Global Scoreboard Standards Updated!

I have completely overhauled how time is displayed on the server to provide a cleaner and more professional experience.

  • New Formatting: Conjunctions like 'and' have been removed. Timers now use clean shorthand (e.g., 4m 14s).
  • Smart Precision: Seconds and decimals are hidden for long-duration timers, while high precision is maintained for short cooldowns under 1 minute.
  • Personal Timer: All members can now use /timer set to track their own tasks directly on the sidebar! (Delete with /timer delete).
-OkScoreboardRework.title: System Update: Scoreboard & Personal Timers

-OkTeleporterPolish.content:
Teleporter Ability Polished!

The Teleporter class has received a major mechanical update to improve interaction consistency and UI feedback.

  • Blink Refinement: Blink activation has been moved to Shift + F to prevent accidental triggers and align with other class controls.
  • Full UI Integration: All Teleporter cooldowns (Network, Blink, and Warp Points) are now fully integrated into the new scoreboard system.
  • Spatial Stability: Improved safety checks for blinking to prevent getting stuck in walls or falling into hazards.
-OkTeleporterPolish.title: Ability Update: Teleporter Polish
